title: International Lady
writer: Howard Estabrook, E. Lloyd Sheldon, Jack DeWitt
actors: George Brent, Ilona Massey, Basil Rathbone
plot: The film opens with a German air raid over the skies of London, and moves to the attempts of the F.B.I. and Scotland Yard investigators trying to circumvent the attempts of a sabotage ring dedicated to impeding the flow of America...
